payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected and ignored. No new durable memory committed on this delivery.
citations: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this retry should not create an additional memory. Any memory from the first successful delivery remains authoritative.

details: Detected retry/duplicate for the same Slack event ID.
Performed idempotent no-op to avoid duplicate memory creation.
Did not resolve ambiguous entities because no new memory was committed on the duplicate delivery.

repair_options: If the first delivery was not actually persisted, reprocess the original event once under its event ID.
If deduplication metadata is missing or corrupted, verify the event ID and prior ingestion status before writing memory.

Any memory from the first successful delivery remains authoritative."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_event_retry","answer":"Duplicate Slack event detected and ignored.
